hero.title: Every format, one toolkit
hero.subtitle: Free browser-based tools to convert JSON, images, and more — privately and instantly.

jsonToTs.title: JSON to TypeScript
jsonToTs.description: Generate TypeScript interfaces and types from any JSON data.

jsonToXml.title: JSON to XML
jsonToXml.description: Convert JSON data into well-formed XML markup.

xmlToJson.title: XML to JSON
xmlToJson.description: Parse XML documents into clean JSON data.

imageToBase64.title: Image to Base64
imageToBase64.description: Convert images to Base64-encoded strings for embedding in code.

base64ToImage.title: Base64 to Image
base64ToImage.description: Decode Base64 strings back into downloadable image files.

imageConverter.title: Image Converter
imageConverter.description: Convert images between PNG, JPEG, and WebP formats.

imageResizer.title: Image Resizer
imageResizer.description: Upload multiple images, batch resize, and download as ZIP.

imageEditor.title: Image Editor
imageEditor.description: Resize, crop, and convert image formats in your browser.

pdfMerge.title: PDF Merge
pdfMerge.description: Combine multiple PDF files into a single document.

pdfSplit.title: PDF Split
pdfSplit.description: Extract pages or split a PDF into individual files.

jsonFormatter.title: JSON Formatter
jsonFormatter.description: Format, minify, and validate JSON data.

hashGenerator.title: Hash Generator
hashGenerator.description: Generate SHA hashes from text or files.

timestampConverter.title: Timestamp Converter
timestampConverter.description: Convert between Unix timestamps and dates.

jwtDecoder.title: JWT Decoder
jwtDecoder.description: Decode JWT tokens to inspect header, payload, and signature.

regexTester.title: Regex Tester
regexTester.description: Test regular expressions with real-time matching and highlighting.

diffChecker.title: Diff Checker
diffChecker.description: Compare two texts and visualize the differences.

colorConverter.title: Color Converter
colorConverter.description: Convert colors between HEX, RGB, and HSL formats.

csvJson.title: CSV / JSON
csvJson.description: Convert between CSV and JSON formats.

footer.privacy: All processing happens in your browser. No data is sent to any server.
